title: Wholesale Account Manager
summary: Own and grow a portfolio of retail accounts across North America. You'll manage relationships, negotiate terms, and identify new business opportunities within the wholesale clothing market.
responsibilities: Manage and grow an assigned portfolio of wholesale retail accounts
Negotiate pricing, terms, and seasonal buying agreements
Prospect and onboard new B2B clients across Canada and the US
Prepare and present order forecasts and sales reports
Collaborate with the inventory team to align stock with client demand
Attend trade shows and industry events as a brand representative
requirements: 2+ years experience in B2B or wholesale sales
Strong negotiation and relationship management skills
Proficiency with CRM software (Salesforce or equivalent)
Excellent written and verbal communication in English
Ability to travel domestically on occasion
Fashion or apparel industry experience is an asset

title: Inventory & Buying Coordinator
summary: Oversee stock levels, coordinate with overseas suppliers, and support the buying team in sourcing seasonal collections. You'll be the link between supply and sell-through performance.
responsibilities: Monitor and manage inventory levels across all product categories
Liaise with overseas manufacturers and domestic suppliers
Support the buying team with seasonal order placement and tracking
Analyse sell-through data and flag slow-moving SKUs
Maintain accurate records in the ERP system
Coordinate inbound shipments and resolve delivery discrepancies
requirements: 2+ years in inventory management, buying, or merchandise planning
Experience with ERP or inventory management software
Strong analytical and Excel skills
Organised, detail-oriented, and comfortable with high SKU volumes
Knowledge of import/export processes is an asset
Fashion or wholesale industry background preferred

title: Outbound Logistics Supervisor
summary: Lead the outbound shipping team ensuring accurate, on-time dispatch of wholesale orders. You'll manage carrier relationships, oversee warehouse staff, and optimise fulfilment processes.
responsibilities: Supervise daily outbound shipping operations and warehouse staff
Manage relationships with freight carriers and third-party logistics providers
Ensure order accuracy and on-time dispatch for all wholesale accounts
Develop and improve standard operating procedures for fulfilment
Track KPIs including dispatch rates, error rates, and carrier performance
Handle escalations and resolve shipping discrepancies promptly
requirements: 3+ years in logistics, warehousing, or distribution operations
Previous supervisory or team lead experience required
Familiarity with WMS (Warehouse Management Systems)
Strong organisational and problem-solving skills
Forklift certification is an asset
Ability to work in a fast-paced physical environment

title: General Worker
summary: Support day-to-day warehouse operations including receiving stock, sorting garments, picking and packing wholesale orders, and maintaining accurate inventory records.
responsibilities: Receive, sort, and store incoming garment shipments
Pick and pack wholesale orders accurately according to packing slips
Maintain cleanliness and organisation of warehouse floor
Conduct routine stock counts and report discrepancies
Operate basic warehouse equipment safely
Follow all health, safety, and company policies at all times
requirements: No formal education requirement — training provided on the job
Ability to lift up to 25kg and stand for extended periods
Reliable, punctual, and able to work as part of a team
Basic English communication skills
Previous warehouse or retail stock experience is an asset
Must be legally entitled to work in Canada (LMIA pathway available)
